hero.title: Free Financial Calculators
hero.subtitle: Mortgage payments, taxes, salary, auto loans and more. Accurate, transparent, free. What your bank doesn't show you.

home.step1Desc: Select US, CA, UK, AU, IE or NZ for country-specific calculations.
home.step2Desc: Input your details. All calculations happen instantly in your browser.
home.step3Desc: See simple results or toggle to detailed view with full amortization.

calc.enterValid: Enter valid values above to see your results.
calc.enterIncome: Enter your annual income above to see the breakdown.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.desc: Calculate your monthly payment, total interest and amortization schedule.

tax.title: Tax Calculator
tax.desc: Calculate your take-home pay and effective tax rate. Updated for 2025-26.
tax.disclaimer: These are estimates based on standard deductions and average rates. Actual tax may differ based on filing status, deductions, credits, and jurisdiction. Consult a tax professional for advice.

footer.tagline: Free financial calculators for 6 countries. What your bank doesn't show you.
footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not financial advice.
footer.covering: Covering US · CA · UK · AU · IE · NZ
